heading: Omitted
label: 1171 to 1173 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 1171 to 1173 were omitted in view of recognition of Philippine independence.Section 1171, , , related to granting of franchises and rights and compensation for property taken or damaged.act Aug. 29, 1916, ch. 416, § 2839 Stat. 555Section 1172, , , related to involuntary servitude and penalties therefor.act Aug. 29, 1916, ch. 416, § 2839 Stat. 555Section 1173, , , related to corporation engaged in real estate business.act July 1, 1902, ch. 1369, § 7532 Stat. 709
